article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.4. Loan Authorization Bylaws - Certificates of Approval 2026-01-27_.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to vote on $195M loan guarantee bylaws for affordable housing
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on two proposed bylaws that would let the City of Burnaby act as a financial backstop — a guarantor — for $195M in loans taken out by the Burnaby Housing Authority to build 386 affordable housing units at two sites.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision — if you own property in Burnaby, this could affect future property tax draws.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Finance & Insurance
